sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_col(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"
						SELECT DISTINCT pm.post_id
						FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} pm
						INNER JOIN {$wpdb->posts} p ON pm.post_id = p.ID
						WHERE pm.meta_key IN (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
						AND p.post_status = 'publish'
						LIMIT 1
					",
					'surerank_settings_general',
					'surerank_settings_schemas',
					'surerank_settings_social',
					'surerank_settings_post_no_index',
					'surerank_settings_post_no_follow',
					'surerank_settings_post_no_archive'
				)
			)

get_option(
			'zipwp_user_business_details',
			array(
				'business_name'          => '',
				'business_address'       => '',
				'business_phone'         => '',
				'business_email'         => '',
				'business_category'      => '',
				'business_category_name' => '',
				'business_description'   => '',
				'templates'              => array(),
				'language'               => '',
				'images'                 => array(),
				'image_keyword'          => array(),
				'social_profiles'        => array(),
			)
		)
$wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE meta_key = '_wp_attached_file' AND meta_value LIKE %s", '%/' . $filename . '%' ) )

get_option(
			'zipwp_user_business_details',
			array(
				'business_name'    => '',
				'business_address' => '',
				'business_phone'   => '',
				'business_category'   => '',
				'business_email'   => '',
				'social_profiles'  => array(),
				'business_description' => '',
				'token' => '',
				'images' => array(),
				'image_keyword' => array(),
				'templates' => array(),
				'language' => 'en',
			)
		)

get_option(
			self::get_nps_id( $plugin_slug ),
			array(
				'dismiss_count'       => 0,
				'dismiss_permanently' => false,
				'dismiss_step'        => '',
				'dismiss_time'        => '',
				'dismiss_timespan'    => null,
				'first_render_time'   => null,
			)
		)

get_option(
			'zipwp_user_business_details',
			array(
				'business_name'    => '',
				'business_address' => '',
				'business_phone'   => '',
				'business_email'   => '',
				'business_category'  => '',
				'business_description' => '',
				'templates' => array(),
				'language' => 'en',
				'images' => array(),
				'image_keyword' => array(),
				'social_profiles' => array()
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT p.ID, p.post_content
			FROM {$wpdb->posts} p
			INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} pm ON p.ID = pm.post_id
			WHERE pm.meta_key = '_astra_sites_imported_post'
			AND p.post_content LIKE '%wp:surecart/%'"
		)

$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching -- We are checking if this image is already processed. WO_Query would have been overkill.
				$wpdb->prepare(
					'SELECT `post_id` FROM `' . $wpdb->postmeta . '`
						WHERE `meta_key` = \'_astra_sites_image_hash\'
							AND `meta_value` = %s
					;',
					$this->get_hash_image( $attachment['url'] )
				)
			)

get_option(
			'zipwp_user_business_details',
			array(
				'business_name'        => '',
				'business_address'     => '',
				'business_phone'       => '',
				'business_email'       => '',
				'business_category'    => '',
				'business_description' => '',
				'templates'            => array(),
				'language'             => 'en',
				'images'               => array(),
				'image_keyword'        => array(),
				'social_profiles'      => array(),
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching -- We are checking if this image is already processed. WO_Query would have been overkill.
			$wpdb->prepare(
				'SELECT `post_id` FROM `' . $wpdb->postmeta . '`
                    WHERE `meta_key` = \'_astra_sites_image_hash\'
                        AND `meta_value` = %s
                ;',
				ST_Importer_Helper::get_hash_image( $url )
			)
		)

			"SELECT p.ID, p.post_content
			FROM {$wpdb->posts} p
			INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} pm ON p.ID = pm.post_id

				$wpdb->prepare(

						WHERE `meta_key` = \'_astra_sites_image_hash\'
							AND `meta_value` = %s
					;',

$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching -- We are checking if this image is already processed. WO_Query would have been overkill.
			$wpdb->prepare(
				'SELECT `post_id` FROM `' . $wpdb->postmeta . '`
                    WHERE `meta_key` = \'_astra_sites_image_hash\'
                        AND `meta_value` = %s
                ;',
				ST_Importer_Helper::get_hash_image( $url )
			)
		)

				esc_html__( 'Import data could not be read. Please try a different file.', 'astra-sites' ),
				'',

					'back_link' => true,
				)

					),
				)
			)

wp_remote_get(
			$api_url,
			array(
				'headers'   => array(
					'Content-Type'  => 'application/json',
					'Accept'        => 'application/json',
					'Authorization' => 'Bearer ' . $zipwp_token,
				),
				'sslverify' => false,
				'timeout'   => 30, // phpcs:ignore WordPressVIPMinimum.Performance.RemoteRequestTimeout.timeout_timeout -- 30 seconds is required sometime for the ZipWP API response
			)
		)
wp_send_json_error( __( 'You are not allowed to perform this action', 'astra-sites' ) )
wp_send_json_error( __( 'Need to send URL of the image to be downloaded', 'astra-sites' ) )

						"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_content = REPLACE(post_content, %s, %s) WHERE ID IN ({$placeholders})",

					)

$wpdb->prepare(
						"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_content = REPLACE(post_content, %s, %s) WHERE ID IN ({$placeholders})",
						array_merge( array( $old_escaped, $new_escaped ), $post_ids )
					)

source.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT p.ID, p.post_content
			FROM {$wpdb->posts} p
			INNER JOIN {$wpdb->postmeta} pm ON p.ID = pm.post_id
			WHERE pm.meta_key = '_astra_sites_imported_post'
			AND p.post_content LIKE '%wp:surecart/%'"
		)

sink.expression:

			WHERE pm.meta_key = '_astra_sites_imported_post'
			AND p.post_content LIKE '%wp:surecart/%'"
		)

source.expression:
$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching -- We are checking if this image is already processed. WO_Query would have been overkill.
				$wpdb->prepare(
					'SELECT `post_id` FROM `' . $wpdb->postmeta . '`
						WHERE `meta_key` = \'_astra_sites_image_hash\'
							AND `meta_value` = %s
					;',
					$this->get_hash_image( $attachment['url'] )
				)
			)
